channel.title: cs.AI updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: Computer Science -- Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI) updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive

item.title: Sparse attention scaling laws for long-context reasoning
item.description: We study scaling laws for sparse attention mechanisms in long-context language models...
item.dc:creator: Jane Smith, John Doe, Alice Wong

item.title: Reinforcement learning from synthetic preferences
item.description: We evaluate RLHF against models trained on synthetic preferences...
item.dc:creator: Bob Lee
